name: chr22_22q12_LIF_OSM_SD
description: 22q12.1-12.2 region containing the LIF/OSM cytokine cluster and CHEK2 SDs. Several intrachromosomal SDs at 30-100 kb / 96-99% identity flank CHEK2 and create a known mapping problem: CHEK2 itself has multiple paralogous fragments scattered across the genome (chr2, chr7, chr10, chr13, chr15, chr16, chrX, chrY) confounding short-read variant calling.

architecture.internal_structure: CHEK2-flanking SDs at 22q12 plus dispersed CHEK2 pseudogenes elsewhere; LIF/OSM tandem paralogs at >97% identity.

related_diseases: CHEK2 false-positive variant calls from pseudogene reads
